raw_title: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_en: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_zh: 可信的改变：政党如何利用选举承诺来抵消政策立场淡化时的声誉损失
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了当政党改变或淡化其政策立场时，如何通过选举承诺来维护自己的声誉。研究发现，政党会使用具体的承诺来让选民相信他们的改变是可信的，从而避免声誉受损。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how political parties use election promises to maintain their reputation when they change or dilute their policy positions. It finds that parties use specific promises to convince voters that their changes are credible, thus avoiding damage to their reputation.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注政治传播中政党如何通过策略性沟通（如选举承诺）来管理声誉和应对政策变化，属于政治心理学和战略传播的交叉领域。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on how political parties manage reputation and respond to policy changes through strategic communication (e.g., election promises), intersecting political psychology and strategic communication.
